CGTN Radio

China's athletes have put up consistent performances at the 2024 Paris Summer Olympics in sports they traditionally dominate, but have also had some close calls in their medal pursuits. How is the Chinese contingent looking? What are some other highlights at the Games? Also in this episode, we touch on some interesting stories that took place away from the competitions in Paris.
